role_title: Program Manager & Process Analyst - Vice President

location.office_time_required: four days in office, one day remote (Friday)

seniority.level: Mid-level (VP title but mid-level scrum master by JD content)
level_signals: 3–6 years of experience as a Scrum Master, Agile Project Manager, or similar role
JD explicitly describes 'mid-level Scrum Master' in opening
VP title in role name conflicts with mid-level framing in JD body

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3–6 years of experience as a Scrum Master, Agile Project Manager, or similar role
Experience supporting technology delivery teams (software, data, automation, or AI)
Strong understanding of Scrum and Agile delivery frameworks
Experience with Agile tooling such as Jira, Confluence, Azure DevOps, or similar
Strong communication, facilitation, and organizational skills

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Scrum Master certification (CSM, PSM I/II, or equivalent)
Experience working in financial services or other regulated environments
Experience supporting globally distributed or offshore teams
Exposure to automation platforms (e.g., UiPath) or AI‑related initiatives

scope.surface: Agile delivery across technology teams focused on data, automation, and AI-enabled solutions
core_responsibilities: Facilitate Agile ceremonies including sprint planning, daily standups, backlog refinement, sprint reviews, and retrospectives
Support Agile teams in delivering committed sprint objectives with predictability and quality
Identify, track, and help remove delivery impediments and risks
Partner with Product Owners to ensure backlog readiness, prioritization, and clear acceptance criteria
Manage dependencies across engineering, data, automation, and business teams
Track and report Agile delivery metrics (velocity, burndown, throughput)
Provide clear delivery status updates and escalate risks as needed
Promote Agile best practices and continuous improvement across teams

green_flags: Comprehensive benefits package including 100% employer-paid health and dental insurance
Equity offered to all full-time employees
Clear Agile tooling requirements specified (Jira, Confluence, Azure DevOps)
Hybrid flexibility (1 remote day per week)
red_flags: Role title is 'Vice President' but JD body explicitly describes a 'mid-level Scrum Master' — significant seniority mismatch that may reflect inflated titling or misaligned expectations
No compensation range disclosed despite competitive market norms
No cities listed; office location unclear from JD
Visa sponsorship and work authorization requirements not addressed

fields_inferred_not_stated: scope.business_model (inferred from iCapital's known identity as a fintech/financial services platform)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly listed as KPIs)
location.cities_listed (no specific city named in JD body for this role)
ambiguities: Role title is 'Program Manager & Process Analyst - Vice President' but the JD body opens with 'We are seeking a mid-level Scrum Master' — VP title and mid-level descriptor are contradictory; could reflect iCapital's internal leveling (VP = mid-level IC) or a genuine mismatch.
Location/city not specified in JD; office policy (4 days in office) is stated but the office location is unknown.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship not mentioned anywhere in the JD.
